title: Best burger in town!
body: The OG Baby is my go-to. Perfect size, incredible sauce. Order it every week.

title: Cheese lovers dream
body: The double cheese is insane. Melty, gooey, and the bun is perfectly toasted. Worth every rupee.

title: Big Baby lives up to the hype
body: Ordered the Big Baby Classic for the first time. Huge portion, great taste. Only wish the fries were crispier.

title: Thickest shake in town
body: The Chocolate Malt Shake is absolutely divine. Thick, rich, and genuinely chocolatey. Not watered down like other places.

title: Paneer done right
body: Finally a burger joint that knows how to do paneer. The tikka patty is crispy outside and soft inside. Mint chutney is a nice touch.

title: Healthy and actually tasty
body: Was skeptical about the Protein Power Bowl but it's legit. Filling, good macros, and the tahini dressing ties it together.

title: Good but too spicy for me
body: The Spicy Lil' One is tasty but the habanero sauce was a bit much. Would be great if they had a medium spice option.

title: Best value combo anywhere
body: Baby Combo at 149 is unbeatable. Burger, fries, and a drink — perfect for college lunch break. Been ordering twice a week.
